message.content:
I need to check whether the requirements in `D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\myfeature\2093-文档设置权限功能优化\index.md` have been implemented in both collabspace-server and collabspace-web.

The requirements are:
1. Top area: admin list showing document permission source (default collapsed)
2. Team permission settings: tree structure, pagination 20/page, search, roles: manager/editor/reader/invisible
3. Member permission settings: only show manually set members, pagination 20/page, search, roles: manager/editor/reader/remove. Special case: conflict prompt when member's team has higher permission
4. Permission change history: time desc, includes team+member changes, pagination 20/page, search all content

Please search the following in collabspace-server:
1. Search for controllers related to node role / permission: `grep -r "listTeamRoles\|listMemberRoles\|permissionLogs\|addRole\|editRole\|deleteRole\|batchEditRole\|batchDeleteRole\|listAdmins\|listManagers\|adminList" in controller files`
2. Check if there's an admin list API
3. Check if there's a permission conflict detection (hasConflict) implementation
4. Check if permission logs include both team and member changes

Search in collabspace-web:
1. Check if there are components for the permission dialog
2. Check if admin list UI is implemented
3. Check if team tree display is implemented
4. Check if permission conflict prompt dialog exists
5. Check if permission change history UI is implemented

Do research only, no code changes. Report what's implemented and what's missing.

content.text: Failed to authenticate. API Error: 403 {"error":"模型 claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 未授权使用"}
